purpose: Qualitative forward-test cases for observable skill behavior. These cases do not claim automated design quality or benchmark scores.

cases.prompt: Define a visual direction for an AI incident-response product used by on-call engineers. The existing app has dense tables, logs, and a navy brand color.
must_observe: one coherent visual thesis tied to on-call work
existing brand and operational density are preserved
first viewport and responsive intent are specified
decisions map to implementable tokens or component rules
must_not_observe: a recommendation to replace the product UI with marketing cards

cases.prompt: Create a visual direction for a documentary photographer's portfolio with strong existing work but no established website identity.
must_observe: the photography remains the focal evidence
typography and composition support the work
reference principles are separated from imitation
mobile image and navigation behavior are addressed

cases.prompt: Reconcile three button implementations and two competing color-token files in an existing React app without redesigning the product.
must_observe: reconcile mode is selected
existing consumers and migration risk are inspected
semantic roles replace accidental raw-value coupling
button anatomy, variants, states, and accessibility are defined
must_not_observe: blind replacement of every matching color

cases.prompt: Extend an existing design system with a destructive confirmation dialog and async loading behavior.
must_observe: existing dialog and action patterns are inspected
focus management and keyboard behavior are specified
loading, error, cancellation, and destructive states are covered
one representative implementation is verified when code is in scope
must_not_observe: a variant explosion disconnected from real states

cases.prompt: Build a launch page for a local-first API client. We have a working product screenshot and no customer logos or metrics yet.
must_observe: a conversion brief and page argument
the product screenshot is used as evidence
claims are narrowed to available proof
CTA destinations and success behavior are explicit
must_not_observe: repeated feature-card sections without a decision purpose

cases.prompt: Improve a pricing page where users do not understand annual billing, seat minimums, or what happens after starting a trial.
must_observe: material terms appear before commitment
CTA copy predicts the next step
objections and risk are mapped near relevant actions
form, loading, error, and success paths are verified
must_not_observe: visual hierarchy that disguises the more expensive commitment

cases.prompt: A repository dashboard overflows at 390px when branch names and commit hashes are long. Reproduce and fix it.
must_observe: the exact route, state, and viewport are reproduced
intrinsic sizing and min-width constraints are inspected
long and unbroken content is stress-tested
the failed width and adjacent widths are retested
must_not_observe: a one-off pixel offset without root-cause analysis

cases.prompt: A mobile settings dialog fits visually but its final control is hidden behind a sticky action bar during keyboard navigation.
must_observe: focus and sticky-content interaction are reproduced
severity and root cause are reported
keyboard and mobile viewport behavior are both retested
before and after evidence is recorded
must_not_observe: testing only the default mouse state
removing the control to make the screenshot fit

cases.prompt: Audit a signup form with placeholder-only labels, password errors shown only in red, and an automatically checked marketing box.
must_observe: programmatic labels and useful errors are required
meaning is not conveyed through color alone
preselected consent is removed
keyboard, error, and success paths are verified
must_not_observe: a WCAG conformance claim from automation alone
conversion advice that preserves deceptive consent

cases.prompt: Improve a subscription cancellation flow that hides the final action, repeatedly asks users to stay, and loses focus when a retention dialog opens.
must_observe: the complete cancellation path is mapped
obstructive cancellation is identified as a dark pattern
dialog focus management and recovery are fixed
commitment and completion states are clear
must_not_observe: an accessibility tradeoff justified by retention
